one_line: Founder of the Maurya Empire and unifier of much of the northern Indian subcontinent.

appearance.age_look: Late 20s to early 30s, tall and athletic with a swordsman’s build and broad shoulders.
appearance.face: Oval face with a strong jawline, straight prominent nose, medium-brown northern Indian complexion, high cheekbones, sharp dark-brown eyes with slightly thick brows, a small healed scar across the right eyebrow, default expression calm and assessing with a restrained, confident half-smile.
appearance.hair: Thick black hair grown to just below the shoulders, neatly pulled back and tied into a low warrior’s knot at the nape with a narrow dark-red cloth band, front hair parted slightly off-center with two short strands framing the temples, no crown or diadem, only a plain narrow gold headband resting above the forehead like a simple fillet.
appearance.costume: Bare upper torso except for a fitted sleeveless cotton angarkha-style vest in deep indigo blue that opens slightly at the chest and ties at the right side with two visible braided cords, the vest’s edges trimmed with a narrow dull-gold border; around his lower body a knee-to-mid-calf length dhoti in unbleached off-white cotton, wrapped tightly and pleated at the front in the Magadha style and tucked at the waist to allow free movement, secured by a broad dark-red cotton kamarbandh (waist sash) wrapped twice and knotted on his left hip with the ends hanging down; on his forearms simple brown leather bracers without metal plates, and on his feet plain brown leather sandals with toe loops; jewellery kept minimal but royal—one pair of medium-thick gold hoop earrings, a single flat gold armlet on the right upper arm engraved with a subtle geometric pattern, and a simple undecorated gold torque-style neck collar; over one shoulder he sometimes has a lightweight deep-maroon cotton uttariya (shawl) draped from his left shoulder across his back and under the right arm, but it is usually pushed back to keep his arms free, edges finished with a thin cream border.
appearance.signature: A straight-bladed early Indian iron sword (inspired by pre-katana leaf-to-straight transition forms) with a slightly broad, double-edged blade about forearm-length, a simple iron crossguard, a dark-wood hilt wrapped in dark-brown leather and capped with a plain round iron pommel, carried in a plain brown leather scabbard suspended from his left hip by a shoulder belt worn diagonally over the right shoulder.

ref_desc: Chandragupta Maurya is a tall, athletic late-20s man with medium-brown skin, strong jaw, scar over his right eyebrow, long black hair in a low warrior’s knot with a plain gold headband, wearing a deep indigo sleeveless vest, off-white dhoti with dark-red sash, minimal dull-gold jewellery, brown bracers and sandals, and carrying a simple iron straight sword at his left hip with a brown leather scabbard and deep-maroon shawl pushed back.
sheet_prompt: Draw a full-body anime-style character sheet of Chandragupta Maurya as a dignified early Mauryan king and warrior: a tall, athletic late-20s man with medium-brown northern Indian complexion, strong jawline, prominent straight nose, sharp dark-brown eyes, slightly thick brows, and a small healed scar cutting across his right eyebrow, his default expression calm and assessing with a restrained, confident half-smile. Give him thick black hair grown just below the shoulders, pulled back into a neat low warrior’s knot tied with a narrow dark-red cloth band, with a slightly off-center part and two short strands framing his temples, and place a simple narrow gold headband like a fillet above his forehead with no other headgear. Dress him in a fitted sleeveless cotton angarkha-style vest in deep indigo blue that opens slightly at the chest and ties on the right side with two braided cords, the vest edged in a narrow dull-gold border; his upper arms and much of his chest are bare. For the lower body, wrap him in an off-white cotton dhoti, knee-to-mid-calf length, tightly wrapped and pleated at the front in a Magadha style and tucked at the waist, secured with a broad dark-red cotton kamarbandh wrapped twice and knotted on his left hip with the ends hanging down. Add simple brown leather bracers on his forearms, plain brown leather sandals with toe loops, a pair of medium-thick gold hoop earrings, a single flat gold armlet with subtle geometric engraving on his right upper arm, and a simple undecorated gold torque-like neck collar; drape a lightweight deep-maroon cotton uttariya from his left shoulder across his back and under his right arm, mostly pushed behind to keep his arms free, edged with a thin cream border. At his left hip, show his signature weapon: a straight double-edged iron sword with a slightly broad blade about forearm-length, a plain iron crossguard, dark-wood hilt wrapped in dark-brown leather, round iron pommel, all housed in a plain brown leather scabbard suspended by a diagonal shoulder belt over his right shoulder. Use a palette dominated by deep indigo blue, dark red, off-white, medium brown, and dull gold, and show him from front, side, and back to clearly display his fixed hairstyle, facial features, outfit, and sword placement.
